# Pattern #93 — global-state-test allowlist (task #257).
#
# This file lists test sites that are KNOWN to mutate process-global state
# (env vars, cwd, class-static paths) and are either:
#   (a) already opted into the right [Collection] but tripped a heuristic
#       false-positive (e.g. const-name lookup not detected by regex), or
#   (b) grandfathered debt that #255 / #256 are fixing.
#
# Two entry forms are accepted:
#
#   1. A full ``rule|fqn|line|file`` key — line-locked. Generated by
#      reading the ``allowlist_key`` field from
#      ``docs/qa/global-state-report.json``. Moving the line requires a
#      fresh entry, which is intentional — it forces re-review.
#
#   2. A bare FQN ``Some.Namespace.SomeClass`` — suppresses every rule for
#      every line in that class. Use sparingly; only for fixtures that
#      legitimately must touch global state from non-test code.
#
# Lines starting with ``#`` and blank lines are ignored.
#
# Run the gate with:
#   python scripts/ci/detect_global_state_tests.py
# CI workflow: .github/workflows/test-isolation.yml
# Policy doc:  docs/qa/test-isolation-policy.md
#
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Allowlisted entries — read-only paths and "asserted-not-to-exist" literals.
# All have been audited and pose no race risk because:
#   - Source paths under <RepoRoot>/src/... or <RepoRoot>/packs/... are READ
#     only — tests open them via File.ReadAllText and never write back. Two
#     parallel processes both reading the same checked-in file is safe.
#   - "definitely_does_not_exist*" / "nonexistent.exe" literals are used as
#     NEGATIVE test inputs — the test asserts the path is NOT present.
#     Adding a Guid to such a literal would defeat the test's intent (the
#     point is to exercise the not-found code path with a stable input).
# Task #263 (P3 LOW cleanup, Pattern #93 seed backlog).

# --- Read-only repo source paths (Phase7VisualAssetIntegrationTests) ---
class_static_path_no_guid|DINOForge.Tests.Phase7VisualAssetIntegrationTests|29|Phase7VisualAssetIntegrationTests.cs
class_static_path_no_guid|DINOForge.Tests.Phase7VisualAssetIntegrationTests|30|Phase7VisualAssetIntegrationTests.cs

# --- Read-only repo source paths (VFXIntegrationTests / VFXSystemTests) ---
class_static_path_no_guid|DINOForge.Tests.VFXIntegrationTests|17|VFXIntegrationTests.cs
class_static_path_no_guid|DINOForge.Tests.VFXIntegrationTests|18|VFXIntegrationTests.cs
class_static_path_no_guid|DINOForge.Tests.VFXIntegrationTests|19|VFXIntegrationTests.cs
class_static_path_no_guid|DINOForge.Tests.VFXSystemTests|17|VFXSystemTests.cs
class_static_path_no_guid|DINOForge.Tests.VFXSystemTests|18|VFXSystemTests.cs

# --- Asserted-not-to-exist negative-path literals (race-immune by design) ---
hardcoded_temp_path|DINOForge.Tests.GameClientCoverageTests|74|GameClientCoverageTests.cs
hardcoded_temp_path|DINOForge.Tests.RustAssetPipelineTests|214|NativeInteropTests.cs
hardcoded_temp_path|DINOForge.Tests.FileDiscoveryServiceTests|49|SDKCovGapTests.cs
hardcoded_temp_path|DINOForge.Tests.FileDiscoveryServiceTests|181|SDKCovGapTests.cs

# --- Helper class (not a test) — EnvVarScope provides the snapshot/restore
# pattern that test classes use INSIDE their own [Collection(EnvVarMutation)].
# The detector flags the helper because it calls Environment.SetEnvironmentVariable,
# but the helper itself never runs except from within an opted-in [Collection]
# test method. Allowlist the helper; the gate still catches real test classes.
env_mutation_without_collection|DINOForge.Tests.EnvVarScope|35|NativeInteropIntegrationTests.cs
env_mutation_without_collection|DINOForge.Tests.EnvVarScope|38|NativeInteropIntegrationTests.cs
